description: This API routine is obsolete. It has been replaced by the API routine purge_opf_adjvar_indv_3, and is implemented by a call to purge_opf_adjvar_indv_3. Use this API to purge an individual OPF adjustable bus shunt data record from the working case. This API routine was first introduced in release 30.0.0. ierr = purge_opf_adjvar_indv(eibus, shntid)

parameters.name: shntid
parameters.description: Bus shunt identifier. (input; no default allowed).

error_codes.description: adjustable bus shunt identifier is more than two characters.
blank adjustable bus shunt identifier is invalid.
OPF adjustable bus shunt at bus not found.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
